title: englerophytum oblanceolatum
intro: Englerophytum oblanceolatum, also known as African stinkwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapotaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Englerophytum oblanceolatum include its potential to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and exhibit antimalarial activity. It can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, with the latter typically being used in Western herbal medicine.
